/usr/bin/ar qc libcoco.a CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/coro.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/sched.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/context.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/context_api.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/context_coro.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/stack.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/signal.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/stack_pool.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/stack_pool_multi.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/stack_pool_legacy.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/stack_pool_mt.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/cancel.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/core/coro_go.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/sched/locked_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/sched/safepoint.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/sched/global_sched.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/sched/runq.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/sched/sched.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/sched/sched_stats.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/sched/sched_hooks.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/platform/coco_thread.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/platform/coco_mutex.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/platform/coco_cond.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/timer/timer_wheel.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/channel/channel.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/channel/channel_mt.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/io/event_loop.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/io/fd_table.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/io/netpoller_mt.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/io/poll_macos.c.o CMakeFiles/coco.dir/src/platform/macos/ctx_arm64.S.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcoco.a
